_comment: Red-team eval set for compliance_lint.py. Each case asserts the linter's verdict (fail|warn|pass). Run with run_compliance_evals.py whenever the linter, the wiki rules, or the runtime model changes.

cases.text: DGD is a great investment for your portfolio.
Treat DGD as a store of value and hold it for the long term.
This is going to 100x once it moons.
It's undervalued — the next bitcoin, easily.
Thumbnail text: TO $100K
Guaranteed passive income from validating — you'll make money.
Earn returns and retire early on this.
Buy now before you miss out — link to buy in bio.
Ape in and secure your bag.
DGD is a safe haven — a safe place for your money, you can't lose.
Regulators approved DGD, so it's risk-free.
Tired of the casino? Here's a different philosophy of money. Not financial advice.
cases.why: degen-contrast hook is allowed but flagged for review

cases.text: DGD is the anti-degen coin — boring on purpose.
cases.why: degen used as contrast, not a pitch

cases.text: Early in the video we explain scarcity.
A loaf of bread cost about $0.25 in 1960.
cases.why: historical dollar figure — human confirms it's not a target

cases.text: DGD is designed to stay outside securities law — that is what 'safe harbor' means legally.
cases.why: 'safe harbor' as a legal term must pass

cases.text: The price advances along a fixed curve as the network grows.
Coins are released as users join and split among all current users, so the per-person share shrinks as the network grows.
DGD is a monetary system designed to work like sound money.
#soundmoney #economics #monetarypolicy #austrianeconomics #cryptoeducation
Read the white paper in bio to learn how the distribution mechanism works.
Your money buys a little less every year.
cases.why: 'buys' as plain verb must not FAIL (educational)

cases.text: Buy DGD now before you miss out.
